description: Substantive-dominant mix (~20% trivial, ~80% substantive) for Spike 2 pre-pass regression check

issues.question: Q5
issues.description: var used for never-reassigned HASH_ALGO; should be const

issues.question: Q17
issues.expected_fix: remove console.log or route through a structured logger

issues.question: Q2
issues.description: rawToken flows from caller input to crypto.update without length/charset validation
issues.expected_fix: validate token length and charset before hashing; reject malformed input

issues.question: Q1
issues.description: session may be undefined; session.scopes accessed without guard
issues.expected_fix: early return false when session undefined or scopes missing

issues.question: Q8
issues.description: refreshSession awaits fetch but does not handle rejection; unhandled promise rejection on 5xx
issues.expected_fix: wrap fetch/json in try/catch, log failure to audit, rethrow typed error

issues.question: Q9
issues.description: No per-token in-flight-promise dedup; concurrent refreshes can clobber cache
issues.expected_fix: maintain a Map<token, Promise<Session>> of in-flight refreshes

issues.question: Q1
issues.description: Inverted validity check — returns true for expired sessions
issues.expected_fix: return false when expiresAt < now; return true otherwise

false_positive_traps: Line 26: auditLog declared with let because a test hook reassigns it — leave as let
